sections.title: Standard dialogue after Meat and Great

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Had any more minotaur problems recently?

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Not since you killed that one. The beastmaster reckons there was a problem with it imprinting. Happens from time to time.

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Yup. They're meant to imprint on the beastmaster as soon as they're born, but this one seemingly didn't. As I say, it sometimes happens.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Well, hopefully I don't find myself coming up against any more rogue minotaurs.
